items.title_zh: Qt Creator 20 开源跨平台 IDE 发布，支持接入 AI 智能体
items.title_en: Qt Creator 20 Released with AI Agent Support
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，据科技媒体 Phoronix 今天报道，Qt Creator 20 开源跨平台 IDE 现已发布，加入 AI 智能体支持。 据介绍，Qt Creator 20 引入全新 ACP（IT之家注：Agent Client Protocol）框架， 可兼容 Claude Code、OpenAI Codex 等主流大语言模型和 AI 助手 ，以及其他支持 ACP 协议的 AI 服务。开发者可直接在应用内的聊天面板，与 AI 智能体进行交互。 同时，Qt Creator 19 此前已引入 MCP 协议，本次更新则是进一步扩展 AI 生态，让开发者能够接入更多 AI 服务。 此外，本次更新还新增了“禅模式”（Zen Mode），开启后将编辑器界面变得更加沉浸，减少不必要的视觉元素，让开发者专注于代码。
items.summary_en: Qt Creator 20, the open-source cross-platform IDE, was released on June 17 with AI agent support. It introduces the ACP framework compatible with major LLMs like Claude Code and OpenAI Codex, allowing developers to interact with AI agents via an in-app chat panel. The update also adds a Zen Mode for immersive coding.
items.why_zh: Qt Creator 20 的 AI 集成标志着主流开发工具正加速拥抱 AI 辅助编程，提升开发者效率。
items.why_en: The AI integration in Qt Creator 20 signals a trend of mainstream development tools embracing AI-assisted programming to boost developer productivity.

items.title_zh: 氪星晚报｜菜鸟将在荷兰建设欧洲供应链履约中心；有道词典笔获2026 EdTech Breakthrough Award年度K-12教育科技应用大奖；国务院：深入实施“人工智能+”行动，探索人机协同的新型工作形态
items.title_en: Cainiao Builds European Fulfillment Center in Netherlands; State Council Promotes AI+ Action
items.summary_zh: 大公司： 监管约谈山姆后，沃尔玛中国多位高管变动 36氪了解到，山姆会员商店中国 CMO（首席采购官）张青已于近日提交辞呈。此外，据36氪独家了解，沃尔玛中国本次人事变动还包括：Tony Paladinetti，现任沃尔玛国际部战略副总裁，将加入沃尔玛中国，担任沃尔玛中国战略副总裁，直接向朱晓静汇报。内部邮件称，Tony将在完成工作签证流程后于2026年8月正式加入中国团队，并与妻子Meg及孩子一起搬迁至深圳。现任沃尔玛中国战略副总裁杨智安将直接向Tony汇报。过渡期间，Neil Maffey，前任山姆会员商店首席采购官及现任全职顾问，将担任代理山姆会员商店首席采购官，直接向刘鹏，山姆会员商店业态总裁汇报，直至新负责人到岗。祝骏，沃尔玛商店业态总裁将扩大其职责，分管沃尔玛中国地产部。现任沃尔玛中国地产部高级副总裁张晋元将直接向祝骏汇报。本周一，市场监管总局发文称，针对一段时期以来监管发现和媒体曝光的山姆线下门店及线上网店多发的食品安全问题，近日对沃尔玛（中国）投资有限公司（即山姆总部）负责人进行了约谈。 阿里云新增巴黎、柔佛地域，扩建日本、墨西哥数据中心 36氪获悉，6月17日，阿里云在 VIVATECH大会期间宣布法国巴黎、马来西亚柔佛地域正式开服，同时扩建日本东京和墨西哥的数据中心，以满足AI出海与全球市场激增的Token调用需求。本轮扩张完成后，阿里云全球布局升至32个地域、…
items.summary_en: Cainiao plans to build a European supply chain fulfillment center in the Netherlands. China's State Council calls for deepening the 'AI+' action to explore human-machine collaboration. Meanwhile, Sam's Club China CMO resigns, and Alibaba Cloud expands to Paris and Johor, upgrading data centers in Japan and Mexico.
items.why_zh: 菜鸟和阿里云的扩张显示中国科技企业加速全球化布局，而国务院政策则强调 AI 对工作形态的变革作用。
items.why_en: Cainiao and Alibaba Cloud's expansions highlight Chinese tech firms' global push, while the State Council's policy underscores AI's transformative role in work patterns.

items.title_zh: 豪掷50亿押注DeepSeek，宁王跨界AI背后藏何“阳谋”？
items.title_en: CATL Invests 5 Billion in DeepSeek, Expanding into AI
items.summary_zh: 豪掷50亿押注DeepSeek，宁王跨界AI背后藏何“阳谋”？ 手机新浪网
items.summary_en: CATL is reportedly investing 5 billion yuan in AI startup DeepSeek, marking its strategic expansion into AI to enhance battery manufacturing and energy management. Details remain undisclosed.
items.why_zh: 宁德时代作为全球电池巨头跨界 AI，表明传统制造业正积极寻求 AI 赋能以保持竞争力。
items.why_en: CATL's move into AI signals traditional manufacturing giants are actively seeking AI empowerment to stay competitive.

items.title_zh: 微软正考虑接入深度求索模型赋能Copilot协同办公工具
items.title_en: Microsoft Considers DeepSeek V4 for Copilot to Cut Costs
items.summary_zh: 据阿克西奥斯新闻网报道，微软正考虑引入中国人工智能企业深度求索推出的 V4 大模型，作为旗下Copilot协同办公智能助手的低成本备选技术方案。报道称，这家美国科技巨头正在测试由微软云本地部署运行的深度求索V4版本以及其他开源大模型，用来替代目前为Copilot协同办公提供技术支持的Anthropic、OpenAI大模型，以此压缩服务成本。微软计划在未来几周内面向市场推出这款低成本大模型服务。（新浪财经）
items.summary_en: Microsoft is reportedly testing DeepSeek's V4 model as a low-cost alternative for its Copilot assistant, aiming to replace Anthropic and OpenAI models to reduce costs. The service may launch in weeks.
items.why_zh: 微软考虑采用 DeepSeek 模型，显示中国 AI 模型在成本效益上具备全球竞争力，可能改变 AI 服务市场格局。
items.why_en: Microsoft's interest in DeepSeek highlights the cost competitiveness of Chinese AI models, potentially reshaping the AI service market.

items.title_zh: SpaceX 以600亿美元收购 AI 编程初创公司 Cursor
items.title_en: SpaceX acquires Cursor AI coding startup for $60 billion
items.summary_zh: 据雅虎财经报道，SpaceX 以600亿美元收购了 AI 编程初创公司 Cursor。Cursor 是一家专注于 AI 辅助代码生成的初创企业，其技术可帮助开发者更高效地编写代码。此次收购将增强 SpaceX 在软件开发和 AI 领域的能力，但具体整合计划尚未公布。
items.summary_en: SpaceX acquires Cursor AI coding startup for $60 billion Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: SpaceX 巨额收购 AI 编程公司，凸显航天巨头对 AI 驱动软件开发的战略重视。
items.why_en: SpaceX's massive acquisition underscores the aerospace giant's strategic focus on AI-driven software development.

items.title_zh: Databricks 推出 AI 同事 Genie One
items.title_en: Databricks launches AI co-worker, Genie One
items.summary_zh: 据 IT Pro 报道，Databricks 发布了名为 Genie One 的 AI 同事产品。Genie One 旨在作为团队中的虚拟成员，协助完成数据分析、报告生成等任务，提升工作效率。该产品利用 Databricks 的数据智能平台，可自然语言交互，适用于企业协作场景。
items.summary_en: Databricks launches AI co-worker, Genie One IT Pro
items.why_zh: Genie One 代表了 AI 从工具向“同事”角色的演进，预示人机协作新模式。
items.why_en: Genie One represents AI's evolution from tool to 'co-worker', heralding new human-machine collaboration models.

items.title_zh: 有传言称，DeepSeek或已完成超过500亿元融资
items.title_en: Rumor: DeepSeek Completes Over 50 Billion Yuan Funding
items.summary_zh: 有传言称，DeepSeek或已完成超过500亿元融资 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Rumors suggest DeepSeek has completed over 50 billion yuan in funding, potentially one of the largest AI rounds. The company has not confirmed.
items.why_zh: 若融资属实，DeepSeek 将获得巨额资本支持，加速其 AI 模型研发和商业化进程。
items.why_en: If true, the funding would provide DeepSeek with massive capital to accelerate AI model development and commercialization.

items.title_zh: Pinterest推出实验性AI购物应用“Ask Pinterest”
items.title_en: Pinterest launches an experimental AI shopping app called ‘Ask Pinterest’
items.summary_zh: Pinterest推出了一款名为“Ask Pinterest”的实验性AI购物应用。该应用利用人工智能技术，帮助用户通过自然语言搜索和发现商品。用户可以向AI提问，例如“适合夏季派对的装饰品”，应用会提供个性化推荐。此举旨在提升购物体验，并探索AI在电商领域的应用潜力。目前该应用处于实验阶段，尚未广泛开放。
items.summary_en: Pinterest launches an experimental AI shopping app called ‘Ask Pinterest’ TechCrunch
items.why_zh: 这标志着Pinterest在AI购物领域的重要尝试，可能改变用户在线购物和发现商品的方式。
items.why_en: This marks Pinterest's significant foray into AI-powered shopping, potentially transforming how users discover products online.

items.title_zh: 国家规范外卖平台补贴行为，淘宝闪购、京东外卖回应称坚决拥护
items.title_en: China regulates food delivery platform subsidies; Taobao Flash, JD Waimai express support
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，国家市场监管总局今日发布《 外卖平台补贴行为规范十条（征求意见稿） 》，面向社会公开征求意见。 美团随后发文，表示坚决拥护，将认真学习，积极配合，按照要求，推动各项规范要求落地见效。 后续，淘宝闪购和京东方面也相继发文表态，淘宝闪购称其将坚决支持市场监管总局制定相关规范，促进行业高质量发展。 对于《外卖平台补贴行为规范十条（征求意见稿）》，我们将与行业各方一道，共同维护公平有序的市场竞争环境。 京东外卖表示： 京东外卖始终坚持品质外卖定位，追求可持续发展的商业模式，我们将不断规范补贴行为，持续推进行业反内卷，拒绝恶性低价竞争。同时通过七鲜小厨、宝藏小馆等供应链模式创新，和“AI+ 后厨直播”、堂食判官系统等技术创新，推动品质外卖的高质量发展，让消费者更放心、让优质商家经营更好、让骑手更有保障和尊严，促进外卖平台服务行业创新和健康发展。 相关阅读： 《 美团：坚决拥护国家规范外卖平台补贴行为 》 《 不得以长期、大额补贴扰乱市场秩序，外卖平台新规公开征求意见 》 《 京沪首次联合对美团、淘宝闪购、京东外卖三大外卖平台企业开展行政指导 》
items.summary_en: China's State Administration for Market Regulation issued draft rules to regulate food delivery platform subsidies, aiming to curb vicious low-price competition. Meituan, Taobao Flash, and JD Waimai expressed support. JD Waimai plans to use AI technologies like AI-powered kitchen livestreaming to improve service quality.
items.why_zh: 该规范将重塑外卖行业竞争格局，推动从价格战向品质和服务创新转型。
items.why_en: The regulation will reshape competition in the food delivery industry, shifting focus from price wars to quality and service innovation.

items.title_zh: 有传言称，DeepSeek或已完成超过500亿元融资
items.title_en: Rumor: DeepSeek completes over 50 billion yuan in funding
items.summary_zh: 有传言称，DeepSeek或已完成超过500亿元融资 三易生活
items.summary_en: Rumors suggest that AI company DeepSeek has completed over 50 billion yuan in funding. The news is unconfirmed. If true, it would be one of the largest funding rounds in AI, likely used for R&D and expansion.
items.why_zh: 若属实，将刷新AI领域融资纪录，反映资本对国产大模型的高度信心。
items.why_en: If confirmed, it would set a record for AI funding, reflecting strong investor confidence in domestic large language models.

items.title_zh: 梁文锋出资约200亿冲上热搜，DeepSeek首轮融资不止关乎钱
items.title_en: Liang Wenfeng invests ~20 billion yuan; DeepSeek's first funding round is about more than money
items.summary_zh: 梁文锋出资约200亿冲上热搜，DeepSeek首轮融资不止关乎钱 新浪财经
items.summary_en: DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng personally invested about 20 billion yuan in the company's first funding round, sparking attention. The move signals strong founder commitment beyond just capital.
items.why_zh: 创始人巨额自掏腰包，凸显对AI赛道的坚定信念，可能吸引更多战略投资者。
items.why_en: The founder's massive personal investment underscores strong conviction in AI, potentially attracting more strategic investors.

items.title_zh: Broadridge采用Anthropic未发布AI强化关键软件
items.title_en: Broadridge taps Anthropic's unreleased AI to harden critical software
items.summary_zh: 金融科技公司Broadridge与AI公司Anthropic合作，使用其未公开发布的AI模型来强化关键软件系统。该AI用于检测和修复代码漏洞，提升软件安全性和可靠性。此举表明企业级AI在金融领域的应用正加速落地。
items.summary_en: Broadridge taps Anthropic's unreleased AI to harden critical software Stock Titan
items.why_zh: 这是AI在金融软件安全领域的创新应用，可能推动更多企业采用AI进行代码审计。
items.why_en: This innovative use of AI for financial software security could drive broader adoption of AI in code auditing.

items.title_zh: 智谱科创板IPO辅导验收，新开源旗舰模型适配国产芯片
items.title_en: Zhipu AI passes IPO coaching acceptance on STAR Market; new open-source flagship model adapts to domestic chips
items.summary_zh: 智谱科创板IPO辅导验收，新开源旗舰模型适配国产芯片 Sohu
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI has passed IPO coaching acceptance for the STAR Market. It also open-sourced a new flagship model adapted to domestic chips like Huawei and Moore Threads, boosting the domestic AI ecosystem.
items.why_zh: 智谱上市和开源适配国产芯片，标志着国产AI大模型商业化与自主可控并行推进。
items.why_en: Zhipu's IPO and open-source model adapted to domestic chips signal parallel progress in commercialization and self-reliance of Chinese AI.

items.title_zh: 智谱开源新一代大模型GLM-5.2 跻身全球模型前三
items.title_en: Zhipu AI open-sources new model GLM-5.2, ranks among top three globally
items.summary_zh: 智谱开源新一代大模型GLM-5.2 跻身全球模型前三 中国日报网
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI open-sourced GLM-5.2, a new large language model that ranks among the top three globally on benchmarks. It excels in Chinese understanding and generation, promoting AI accessibility.
items.why_zh: GLM-5.2跻身全球前三，证明国产大模型已达到国际一流水平，开源策略加速生态建设。
items.why_en: GLM-5.2's top-three global ranking proves domestic LLMs have reached world-class levels, with open-source accelerating ecosystem growth.

items.title_zh: 中国最强Coding大模型上线开源：华为、摩尔线程等8大国芯片适配
items.title_en: China's strongest coding LLM goes open-source, adapted to 8 domestic chips including Huawei and Moore Threads
items.summary_zh: 中国最强Coding大模型上线开源：华为、摩尔线程等8大国芯片适配 电子工程专辑
items.summary_en: China's most powerful coding LLM has been open-sourced, adapted to 8 domestic chips including Huawei and Moore Threads. It excels in code generation and debugging, lowering barriers to AI programming and boosting the domestic chip ecosystem.
items.why_zh: 该模型开源并适配国产芯片，将极大促进国内AI编程工具的发展，减少对国外硬件依赖。
items.why_en: The open-source coding LLM adapted to domestic chips will greatly advance AI programming tools in China and reduce reliance on foreign hardware.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek首轮融资再曝细节：梁文锋个人出资200亿，腾讯、宁德时代入局
items.title_en: DeepSeek First-Round Financing Details Revealed: Liang Wenfeng Invests 20 Billion Yuan Personally, Tencent and CATL Join
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek首轮融资再曝细节：梁文锋个人出资200亿，腾讯、宁德时代入局 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Details of DeepSeek's first-round financing have been revealed, with founder Liang Wenfeng personally investing 20 billion yuan, and Tencent and CATL also participating. The massive investment demonstrates strong market confidence and will accelerate DeepSeek's AI technology development.
items.why_zh: 该融资事件反映了中国AI领域顶级创业公司的估值和资本吸引力，以及产业资本对AI赛道的持续加码。
items.why_en: This financing event reflects the valuation and capital appeal of top Chinese AI startups, and the continued investment of industrial capital in the AI sector.

items.title_zh: 字节AI战略大变局：2亿用户豆包日亏千万，全面转向ToB求生
items.title_en: ByteDance AI Strategy Shift: Doubao Loses Millions Daily, Pivots to ToB
items.summary_zh: 字节AI战略大变局：2亿用户豆包日亏千万，全面转向ToB求生 k.sina.com.cn
items.summary_en: ByteDance's AI product Doubao, with 200 million users, is losing tens of millions daily. The company is pivoting to enterprise services (ToB) to monetize and reduce losses, potentially reshaping the AI competitive landscape.
items.why_zh: 字节跳动作为国内AI巨头，其战略转向ToB可能引发行业连锁反应，影响AI商业化路径。
items.why_en: ByteDance's strategic pivot to enterprise AI could trigger industry-wide shifts in monetization strategies.

items.title_zh: 银昕推出双滚珠轴承 12025 风扇 Air Frost C120，边框支持 DIY 玩法
items.title_en: SilverStone Launches Dual Ball Bearing 12025 Fan Air Frost C120 with DIY Frame
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，SilverStone（银欣 / 银昕）现已在其官网上线 12025 规格的双滚珠轴承 PWM 风扇 Air Frost C120。该型号宣称采用“工业级耐用设计”，主打“持久稳定”。 Air Frost C120 采用 PBT 塑料材质，拥有九片一体式连框扇叶。其外框装饰盖导入可拆卸式模块化设计， 支持涂装、贴膜、3D 打印等 DIY 玩法 。 IT之家了解到，这款风扇转速区间 0~3000 RPM (±10%)、最大风量 85.99 CFM、最大静压 4.96mmAq，噪音区间 7.49-38.96dB(A)，额定电压 12V、额定电流≤0.45A。
items.summary_en: SilverStone has launched the Air Frost C120, a 12025 dual ball bearing PWM fan with industrial-grade durability and a modular frame for DIY customization. It offers 0-3000 RPM speed, 85.99 CFM airflow, and 4.96mmAq static pressure.
items.why_zh: 该产品结合了高性能散热与个性化DIY设计，满足了PC爱好者对散热和外观的双重需求。
items.why_en: This product combines high-performance cooling with DIY customization, meeting PC enthusiasts' dual needs for cooling and aesthetics.

items.title_zh: 摩根大通上调预测：2030 年全球 AI 基建支出超 5 万亿美元
items.title_en: JPMorgan Raises Forecast: Global AI Infrastructure Spending to Exceed $5 Trillion by 2030
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，摩根大通分析师近日上调全球 AI 资本支出预测，按照目前的预计，2030 年全球 AI 与数据中心支出将达到 5 万亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 33.85 万亿元人民币）以上。 摩根大通指出，大型云计算企业正在以前所未有的速度扩大资本支出， Meta 、 Alphabet（谷歌母公司） 、 微软 、 亚马逊和甲骨文等公司去年的开支预计达到 3420 亿美元（现汇率约合 2.32 万亿元人民币） ，同比增长 62%。 同时，摩根大通预计，2026 年-2030 年期间，全球将新增 122GW（吉瓦）的数据中心用电量。作为参考，1GW 电力可满足 75 万户家庭用电需求。截至 2025 年中，全球数据中心建设投资已达到年化 400 亿美元（现汇率约合 2707.91 亿元人民币），同比增长 30%，AI 带来的算力需求前所未有。 如此庞大的数据中心建设潮自然需要海量资金。摩根大通预计，未来五年的 AI 数据中心相关杠杆融资将达到 1500 亿美元（现汇率约合 1.02 万亿元人民币），投资级债券则达到 1.5 万亿美元（现汇率约合 10.15 万亿元人民币）。
items.summary_en: JPMorgan forecasts global AI and data center spending will exceed $5 trillion by 2030, driven by cloud giants' capex which reached $342 billion last year, up 62% YoY. The bank expects 122GW of new data center power demand from 2026-2030.
items.why_zh: 该预测凸显了AI算力需求的爆发式增长，以及其对全球资本支出和能源基础设施的深远影响。
items.why_en: This forecast highlights the explosive growth in AI computing demand and its profound impact on global capital expenditure and energy infrastructure.

items.title_zh: Mistral CEO在Anthropic禁令后力推开源AI：我们不受国家控制
items.title_en: Mistral CEO pitches open source AI days after Anthropic ban: ‘We exist outside of state control’
items.summary_zh: 在Anthropic被禁止后不久，Mistral AI的CEO公开倡导开源AI，并强调公司独立于国家控制之外。这一表态旨在吸引那些对大型科技公司和政府监管持谨慎态度的用户。Mistral的开源策略可能使其在AI市场中占据独特位置，尤其是在欧洲，对数据主权和AI伦理的关注日益增加。
items.summary_en: Mistral CEO pitches open source AI days after Anthropic ban: ‘We exist outside of state control’ Sifted
items.why_zh: 该事件反映了AI领域开源与闭源路线的持续争论，以及欧洲AI公司对数据主权的重视。
items.why_en: This event reflects the ongoing debate between open and closed source AI, and European AI companies' emphasis on data sovereignty.

items.title_zh: vivo X Fold6 折叠屏手机三色外观公布，6 月 26 日发布
items.title_en: vivo X Fold6 Foldable Phone Revealed in Three Colors, Launching June 26
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，vivo X Fold6 折叠屏手机新品发布会定档 6 月 26 日 19:00 举行，这款新机已开启线上全平台预约。 IT之家注意到，vivo 官方今日发布视频，揭晓了这款手机的三款配色， 分别是「蓝洞 」「盐湖 」和「极夜 」 。 据IT之家此前报道，vivo X Fold6 目标打造最强折叠影像旗舰，更是一部“折叠小 V 单”。折叠超强大底真 2 亿， 折叠首发蔡司 APO 超级潜望长焦 ，搭载蓝图影像芯片 V3+，支持搭载等效 200mm 的 vivo 蔡司增距镜 G2，支持蓝图原生色彩，蓝图调色盘和多款色彩风格。 此外，该机内外屏都采用最新、最强一代的发光材料，其中折叠首发的三星 M14 发光材料内屏，峰值亮度更高，功耗更低。 vivo X Fold6 搭载天玑 9500 超能版处理 器，号称“专门为大屏折叠机开发 SoC”，NPU 峰值性能比上代提升 111%，功耗还进一步优化了 56%，算力翻倍，功耗减半；针对 X Fold6 大屏 +AI 功能做深度适配。
items.summary_en: vivo X Fold6 foldable phone will launch on June 26, featuring three colors, a 200MP camera with Zeiss APO periscope telephoto, V3+ imaging chip, Samsung M14 inner display, and Dimensity 9500 processor with 111% NPU performance boost.
items.why_zh: 该手机代表了折叠屏影像和AI性能的最新突破，展示了vivo在高端市场的技术实力。
items.why_en: This phone represents the latest breakthroughs in foldable imaging and AI performance, showcasing vivo's technical strength in the high-end market.

items.title_zh: SpaceX将以600亿美元正式收购Cursor
items.title_en: SpaceX will officially acquire Cursor for $60 billion
items.summary_zh: 据《财富》杂志报道，SpaceX将以600亿美元的价格正式收购AI公司Cursor。这笔巨额交易将SpaceX的航天业务与Cursor的AI技术相结合，可能推动太空探索和AI的深度融合。收购完成后，Cursor的AI能力有望应用于SpaceX的星链、星舰等项目，提升自动化和决策效率。
items.summary_en: SpaceX will officially acquire Cursor for $60 billion Fortune
items.why_zh: 这笔收购标志着航天与AI两大前沿领域的重大整合，可能重塑太空产业的竞争格局。
items.why_en: This acquisition marks a major integration of aerospace and AI, potentially reshaping the competitive landscape of the space industry.

items.title_zh: CYGNVS推出应对公司自身AI引发危机的指挥中心
items.title_en: CYGNVS launches command center for crises caused by a company’s own AI
items.summary_zh: CYGNVS推出了一个专门用于管理由公司自身AI系统引发的运营危机的指挥中心。该平台旨在帮助企业快速响应和缓解AI故障、偏见或意外行为带来的风险。随着AI在企业中的广泛应用，此类危机管理工具变得日益重要。CYGNVS的解决方案可能包括实时监控、应急响应流程和合规报告等功能。
items.summary_en: CYGNVS launches command center for crises caused by a company’s own AI SiliconANGLE
items.why_zh: 该产品填补了AI治理和风险管理领域的空白，反映了企业对AI安全性和可控性的迫切需求。
items.why_en: This product fills a gap in AI governance and risk management, reflecting the urgent need for AI safety and controllability in enterprises.

items.title_zh: CYGNVS推出AI事件指挥中心以管理AI驱动的运营危机
items.title_en: CYGNVS Launches AI Incident Command Center to Manage AI-Driven Operational Crises
items.summary_zh: CYGNVS发布了AI事件指挥中心，专门用于管理由AI引发的运营危机。该平台提供实时监控、应急响应和合规管理功能，帮助企业应对AI系统故障、数据泄露或伦理问题。随着AI在关键业务中的深入应用，此类工具对于维护运营稳定性和品牌声誉至关重要。
items.summary_en: CYGNVS Launches AI Incident Command Center to Manage AI-Driven Operational Crises Morningstar
items.why_zh: 该中心为企业提供了应对AI风险的标准化流程，是AI治理领域的重要创新。
items.why_en: This center provides enterprises with standardized processes for AI risk management, representing a key innovation in AI governance.

items.title_zh: JoyBuilder首批接入！智谱GLM-5.2正式上线京东云
items.title_en: Zhipu GLM-5.2 Launches on JD Cloud, JoyBuilder First to Integrate
items.summary_zh: JoyBuilder首批接入！智谱GLM-5.2正式上线京东云 Sohu
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's GLM-5.2 model is now available on JD Cloud, becoming one of the first models integrated into JD Cloud's JoyBuilder platform. This enables users to easily access GLM-5.2's capabilities for AI application development.
items.why_zh: 智谱与京东云的合作标志着国产大模型在云服务生态中的进一步落地，降低了企业使用先进AI的门槛。
items.why_en: The partnership between Zhipu and JD Cloud marks further deployment of domestic large models in cloud service ecosystems, lowering the barrier for enterprises to adopt advanced AI.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek融资传闻背后：中国大模型开始按战略资产重新定价
items.title_en: DeepSeek Funding Rumors: Chinese LLMs Revalued as Strategic Assets
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek融资传闻背后：中国大模型开始按战略资产重新定价 风闻
items.summary_en: Rumors suggest DeepSeek's valuation may exceed $50 billion, signaling that Chinese LLM companies are being revalued as strategic assets amid intensifying global AI competition.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的估值变化反映了市场对中国AI战略价值的重新评估，可能影响整个行业的融资环境。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's valuation shift reflects a market reassessment of Chinese AI's strategic importance, potentially impacting industry funding.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek首轮融资完成，传梁文锋砸200亿“一票独大”
items.title_en: DeepSeek Completes First Funding Round; Liang Wenfeng Reportedly Invests 20 Billion
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek首轮融资完成，传梁文锋砸200亿“一票独大” 新浪财经
items.summary_en: DeepSeek has completed its first funding round, with founder Liang Wenfeng reportedly investing 20 billion yuan for a controlling stake, signaling strong confidence.
items.why_zh: 梁文锋个人巨额投资 DeepSeek，凸显创始人重注 AI 赛道的决心，可能影响公司治理结构。
items.why_en: Liang's massive personal investment underscores his commitment to AI, potentially shaping DeepSeek's governance.

items.title_zh: 智谱IPO辅导状态变更_新浪新闻
items.title_en: Zhipu IPO Coaching Status Changes
items.summary_zh: 智谱IPO辅导状态变更_新浪新闻 新浪网
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's IPO coaching status has changed, with details undisclosed. The company previously initiated IPO coaching for the STAR Market with a planned fundraising of 15 billion yuan, and this change may indicate progress.
items.why_zh: 智谱IPO进展是市场观察国内AI大模型公司资本化进程的重要风向标。
items.why_en: Zhipu's IPO progress is a key indicator for the capitalization process of domestic AI large model companies.

items.title_zh: 智谱科创板IPO辅导验收，“全球大模型第一股”携150亿募资计划冲刺A股
items.title_en: Zhipu Passes STAR Market IPO Coaching Review, Plans to Raise 15 Billion Yuan as 'First Global Large Model Stock'
items.summary_zh: 智谱科创板IPO辅导验收，“全球大模型第一股”携150亿募资计划冲刺A股 风闻
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI has passed the IPO coaching review for the STAR Market, planning to raise 15 billion yuan as the 'first global large model stock'. This milestone indicates readiness for IPO filing.
items.why_zh: 智谱若成功上市，将成为全球首家公开上市的大模型公司，具有里程碑意义。
items.why_en: If successful, Zhipu would become the first publicly listed large model company globally, marking a milestone.

items.title_zh: 浙大系创业者冲港股IPO，仙工智能招股书五大看点
items.title_en: Zhejiang University Startup Xian Gong Intelligent Files Hong Kong IPO at HK$101.6 per Share
items.summary_zh: 6月15日，智能机器人公司仙工智能（06106.HK）开始招股，招股价101.60港元，每手50股，市值112.27亿港元。 仙工智能最早于2025年5月第一次向港交所递交招股书，6个月失效后，又于当年11月重新递交，直到今年6月才通过聆讯。仙工智能这次是以18C特专科技公司身份赴港上市，预计6月24日挂牌敲钟。中金独家保荐，招银国际为整体协调人。 有意思的是，这家公司的核心壁垒不在机器人本身，而在机器人的"大脑"——控制器。灼识咨询按销量计，仙工的机器人控制器全球第一、中国第一，市占率24.8%和45.2%。一个"卖大脑"的公司要上市了，但硬氪抽丝剥茧713页招股书后会发现，仙工智能有五大看点： 看着要盈利了？"0.6%亏损率"暗藏两处玄机 先看营收。仙工2023到2025年收入分别为2.49亿、3.39亿、4.42亿元，三年复合增速33.2%，每年都在30%以上。亏损方面：经调整净亏损从2023年的2091万元，一路收窄到2025年的287万元，经调整净亏损率只剩0.6%。看着马上就要盈利了。 但这里有第一处玄机。经调整是"非国际财务报告准则"口径，剔除了股份支付等项目。如果回到报表口径，仙工2025年亏损4707.6万元、2024年亏损4230.8万、2023年亏损4770.4万——亏损收窄确实在发生，但远没到盈利。2025年净亏损率实际是10.7%。 第二处玄机更值得玩味，…
items.summary_en: Intelligent robot company Xian Gong Intelligent has launched its Hong Kong IPO at HK$101.6 per share, with a market cap of about HK$11.227 billion. The company leads globally in robot controller sales with a 24.8% market share, and its revenue grew at a 33.2% CAGR from 2023 to 2025.
items.why_zh: 仙工智能作为“卖大脑”的机器人公司上市，凸显了控制器在机器人产业中的核心价值。
items.why_en: Xian Gong's IPO highlights the core value of controllers in the robotics industry, as the company sells the 'brain' of robots.

items.title_zh: 报道称 DeepSeek 完成超 500 亿融资,梁文锋出资 200 亿,投资者锁定期 5 年
items.title_en: Report: DeepSeek Raises Over 50 Billion Yuan, Liang Wenfeng Contributes 20 Billion, Investors Locked for 5 Years
items.summary_zh: 报道称 DeepSeek 完成超 500 亿融资,梁文锋出资 200 亿,投资者锁定期 5 年 k.sina.com.cn
items.summary_en: According to reports, AI startup DeepSeek has raised over 50 billion yuan, with founder Liang Wenfeng personally contributing 20 billion yuan. Investors are subject to a 5-year lock-up period.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的巨额融资反映了AI大模型赛道的高资本密集度和投资者对头部公司的追捧。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's massive fundraising reflects the high capital intensity of the AI large model sector and investor enthusiasm for leading companies.

items.title_zh: Day-0 支持：摩尔线程完成智谱 GLM-5.2 极速适配
items.title_en: Moore Threads Completes Day-0 Adaptation of Zhipu GLM-5.2, MTT S5000 GPU Supports Million-Token Context
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息， 智谱今日宣布上线并开源 GLM-5.2 。在全球百万用户参与盲测的前端开发评估系统 Code Arena 上，GLM-5.2 取得全球可用模型第一的表现。摩尔线程今日宣布在 AI 训推一体全功能 GPU 智算卡 MTT S5000 上， 完成对智谱新一代开源旗舰模型 GLM-5.2 的 Day-0 极速适配 。 据介绍，摩尔线程技术团队基于 SGLang-MUSA 推理引擎及 TileLang-MUSA 算子编程语言， 完成了模型结构适配、关键算子优化、框架拉起与部署验证 ，在 MTT S5000 上实现 GLM-5.2 的高效、高精度推理。摩尔线程还表示，MTT S5000 从硬件算力、软件栈到开源框架进行了全链路适配与深度优化： 支撑超长上下文 GLM-5.2 的 Solid 1M 上下文与长程任务能力，使长 Prompt 编码、上下文读入与 KV Cache 生成成为推理链路中的关键环节。长输入请求在进入生成阶段前，需要先完成大规模 Prefill 计算；这一阶段高度依赖并行矩阵计算、Attention 算子效率、显存容量与访存带宽。 MTT S5000 凭借硬件级原生 FP8 加速，单卡稠密算力高达 1000 TFLOPS，配备 80GB 大容量显存与 1.6TB/s 超高带宽， 可在长输入 Prefill 阶段集中释放高吞吐优势，为百万…
items.summary_en: Moore Threads has completed Day-0 adaptation of Zhipu's GLM-5.2 on its MTT S5000 GPU, which delivers 1000 TFLOPS FP8, 80GB memory, and 1.6TB/s bandwidth, supporting the model's million-token context capability.
items.why_zh: 摩尔线程的快速适配展示了国产GPU生态对大模型的支持能力，有助于降低对国外硬件的依赖。
items.why_en: Moore Threads' rapid adaptation demonstrates the capability of domestic GPU ecosystems to support large models, helping reduce reliance on foreign hardware.

items.title_zh: Day-0 支持：摩尔线程完成智谱 GLM-5.2 极速适配
items.title_en: Moore Threads Achieves Day-0 Adaptation for Zhipu GLM-5.2 on MTT S5000
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息， 智谱今日宣布上线并开源 GLM-5.2 。在全球百万用户参与盲测的前端开发评估系统 Code Arena 上，GLM-5.2 取得全球可用模型第一的表现。摩尔线程今日宣布在 AI 训推一体全功能 GPU 智算卡 MTT S5000 上， 完成对智谱新一代开源旗舰模型 GLM-5.2 的 Day-0 极速适配 。 据介绍，摩尔线程技术团队基于 SGLang-MUSA 推理引擎及 TileLang-MUSA 算子编程语言， 完成了模型结构适配、关键算子优化、框架拉起与部署验证 ，在 MTT S5000 上实现 GLM-5.2 的高效、高精度推理。摩尔线程还表示，MTT S5000 从硬件算力、软件栈到开源框架进行了全链路适配与深度优化： 支撑超长上下文 GLM-5.2 的 Solid 1M 上下文与长程任务能力，使长 Prompt 编码、上下文读入与 KV Cache 生成成为推理链路中的关键环节。长输入请求在进入生成阶段前，需要先完成大规模 Prefill 计算；这一阶段高度依赖并行矩阵计算、Attention 算子效率、显存容量与访存带宽。 MTT S5000 凭借硬件级原生 FP8 加速，单卡稠密算力高达 1000 TFLOPS，配备 80GB 大容量显存与 1.6TB/s 超高带宽， 可在长输入 Prefill 阶段集中释放高吞吐优势，为百万…
items.summary_en: Zhipu open-sourced GLM-5.2 on June 17, which ranked first globally in Code Arena blind tests. Moore Threads quickly adapted the model to its MTT S5000 GPU, leveraging SGLang-MUSA and TileLang-MUSA for optimized inference. The MTT S5000, with 1000 TFLOPS FP8 performance and 80GB memory, efficiently handles million-token contexts.
items.why_zh: 此次适配展示了国产GPU在AI大模型推理领域的快速响应能力，有助于推动国产AI生态发展。
items.why_en: This adaptation demonstrates the rapid response capability of domestic GPUs for AI model inference, boosting the domestic AI ecosystem.

items.title_zh: 备案不到半个月！智谱科创板IPO进行辅导验收
items.title_en: Within Half a Month of Filing, Zhipu Passes STAR Market IPO Coaching Review
items.summary_zh: 备案不到半个月！智谱科创板IPO进行辅导验收 Sohu
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI passed its IPO coaching review within half a month of filing, a rapid pace. This milestone indicates readiness for submitting IPO materials to the STAR Market.
items.why_zh: 智谱IPO进展神速，凸显监管层对AI领军企业上市的支持态度。
items.why_en: The rapid progress of Zhipu's IPO highlights regulatory support for leading AI companies going public.

items.title_zh: 从 GAA 到 3D 堆叠式 FET：三星展示业界最小 42nm 栅距 3D 堆叠晶体管，理论密度翻倍
items.title_en: Samsung Demonstrates Industry's Smallest 42nm Gate Pitch 3D Stacked Transistor, Doubling Density
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，三星电子今日宣布，在 6 月 14 日至 18 日举行的 2026 年 VLSI 技术研讨会上，三星半导体研发中心逻辑技术开发团队首次展示了业界首个栅极间距达到 42nm 的 3D 堆叠场效应晶体管架构。 据介绍，该研究论文从超过 1000 篇投稿中脱颖而出，以 8.29 分（IT之家注：满分 10 分）的最高评审分数荣获最佳论文奖，并被选为本届大会技术亮点。 ▲ 平面 n 型 / p 型晶体管布局与垂直堆叠晶体管布局的比较 研究团队表示，随着逻辑芯片对单位面积内晶体管密度的需求不断提高，传统二维平面布局正面临物理极限。在现有逻辑芯片中，n 型和 p 型晶体管通常并排放置于同一平面，而这一新技术则将两者改为上下垂直堆叠，在相同面积内集成更多晶体管。 团队认为，继闪存领域的 V-NAND 和 DRAM 领域的 HBM 通过垂直集成突破密度限制之后，将这一思路扩展到逻辑器件是技术演进的自然方向，有望在相同芯片面积内实现晶体管密度翻倍。 ▲ 三星半导体研发中心团队 三星逻辑技术开发团队负责人 Youngchai Jung 对此表示：“如果存储芯片像快餐，那么逻辑芯片就像精致宴席。逻辑客户需要高度定制化的解决方案，而当前最大的需求之一就是增加单位面积内的晶体管数量。但问题在于，当晶体管靠得太近时，绝缘层会变薄，直至无法阻挡电流，导致芯片失效。垂直集成则消除了…
items.summary_en: Samsung has demonstrated the industry's first 3D stacked FET architecture with a 42nm gate pitch at the 2026 VLSI Symposium. By stacking n-type and p-type transistors vertically, it can double transistor density in the same area.
items.why_zh: 三星的3D堆叠晶体管技术有望延续摩尔定律，为未来高性能芯片提供关键密度提升路径。
items.why_en: Samsung's 3D stacked transistor technology could extend Moore's Law, providing a key density improvement path for future high-performance chips.

items.title_zh: 智谱科创板IPO辅导状态变更为辅导验收
items.title_en: Zhipu's STAR Market IPO Coaching Status Changes to Coaching Acceptance

items.title_zh: 戈勒姆公立学校发布学生AI使用手册
items.title_en: Gorham Public Schools launches AI handbook for students
items.summary_zh: 戈勒姆公立学校（Gorham Public Schools）近日发布了一份面向学生的人工智能使用手册。该手册旨在指导学生如何负责任地使用AI工具，涵盖学术诚信、隐私保护和批判性思维等方面。学校希望通过这一举措，帮助学生理解AI的潜力与风险，并培养他们在数字时代所需的技能。手册的发布反映了教育领域对AI日益增长的关注，以及学校在引导学生正确使用技术方面的努力。
items.summary_en: Gorham Public Schools launches AI handbook for students WGME
items.why_zh: 该手册体现了教育系统对AI伦理和素养教育的重视，为其他学校提供了参考。
items.why_en: This handbook reflects the education system's focus on AI ethics and literacy, serving as a reference for other schools.

items.title_zh: NoonWake.AI完成近千万元种子轮融资，用AI做年轻人的情绪消费品｜智能涌现首发
items.title_en: NoonWake.AI Raises Nearly 10 Million Yuan in Seed Round for AI-Powered Emotional Consumer Products
items.summary_zh: 作者｜梁键强 编辑｜王毓婵 一句话介绍 NoonWake.AI是一家以泛心理为切入点、结合AI技术做情绪消费产品的创业公司，业务覆盖软件和硬件，并同时面向国内外市场。 目前，公司产品包括国内AI陪伴应用“万象有灵”、海外应用Starot、桌面AI陪伴硬件“好运日历机”，以及正在探索的智能水晶手串等轻硬件产品。 团队介绍 NoonWake.AI创始人兼CEO吴尚，本科毕业于中南大学，MBA就读于北京大学光华管理学院。曾先后在中兴、阿里、腾讯和小米任职，参与过OS产品、SaaS、社交产品和智能硬件相关业务。在腾讯期间，吴尚曾参与早期创业项目“我岛”，该项目曾获得600万美元融资。 其他核心成员分别负责技术研发、产品与硬件设计、GTM运营等关键模块。技术负责人喜哥曾任小爱端侧模型核心工程师，主要负责公司模型工程、AI技术架构及相关研发工作。 产品设计负责人美杰曾参与天梯项目，后在字节跳动大力教育负责“大力神灯”相关软硬件设计。目前主要负责产品形态、交互体验和硬件设计。 GTM运营负责人孔松曾任职于58同城、Bigo和转转，具备海外市场运营、直播平台运营和短视频增长经验，负责公司市场进入和用户增长相关工作。此外，团队中还有一位原小米工程师，参与硬件工程和研发落地。 产品及业务 情绪经济正在走红。艾媒咨询报告显示，2024年中国AI泛心理相关服务的市场规模已突破120亿元，年增长率达43.7…
items.summary_en: NoonWake.AI has raised nearly 10 million yuan in seed funding to develop AI-powered emotional consumer products, including apps and hardware. The team hails from Alibaba, Tencent, and Xiaomi. The Chinese AI mental health market exceeded 12 billion yuan in 2024, growing 43.7% annually.
items.why_zh: AI情绪消费市场快速增长，NoonWake.AI的融资反映了这一赛道的投资热度。
items.why_en: The rapid growth of the AI emotional consumer market makes NoonWake.AI's funding a sign of investor interest in this sector.

items.title_zh: ChatGPT 语音最大规模升级：OpenAI 正筹备推出 GPT-Bidi-1 AI 模型
items.title_en: OpenAI Prepares GPT-Bidi-1 Model for Major ChatGPT Voice Mode Upgrade
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，科技媒体 testingcatalog 今天（6 月 17 日）发布博文，报道称 OpenAI 公司正在筹备推出 GPT-Bidi-1 模型， 将成为 ChatGPT 语音模式最大规模升级。 IT之家曾于今年 3 月报道， OpenAI 于 2026 年年初开始研发“双向”（BiDi）架构 ，能够同时听和说，可以吸收用户的打断，并在对话中途实时调整。 报道指出 OpenAI 的文本模型已快速进化至 GPT-5.5，而语音功能仍停留在较旧的音频技术栈上，导致口语对话能力落后文字表现，而 GPT-Bidi-1 模型有望弥合这一差距。 该模型上线后，ChatGPT 用户可以根据需求切换双向模式和现有的高级语音模式，并支持 High、 Medium 以及 Instant 智能等级，方便用户根据任务调整速度和深度。
items.summary_en: OpenAI is developing GPT-Bidi-1, a bidirectional model that can listen and speak simultaneously, enabling real-time interruption handling. This will be the biggest upgrade to ChatGPT's voice mode, bridging the gap between text and voice capabilities.
items.why_zh: GPT-Bidi-1将大幅提升ChatGPT语音交互的自然度和实时性，是AI语音技术的重要突破。
items.why_en: GPT-Bidi-1 will significantly enhance the naturalness and real-time interaction of ChatGPT's voice, marking a breakthrough in AI voice technology.

items.why_en: The record-breaking funding highlights DeepSeek's leadership in AI large models and strong capital market interest.

items.title_zh: 消息称谷歌、AMD 考虑委托三星晶圆代工生产未来 CPU 处理器
items.title_en: Google and AMD Reportedly Consider Samsung for Future CPU Manufacturing
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，据《日经亚洲》消息，有匿名消息人士指出称谷歌、AMD 有意委托三星晶圆代工生产预计 2028 年推出的未来 CPU 处理器。 谷歌在持续推进自研 AI 加速器芯片 TPU 的同时也在推动通用处理器的自主化，其在 2024 年宣布了企业首款数据中心定制 Arm CPU 产品 Axion。而 谷歌正与三星电子洽谈预计 2028 年发布的后续 CPU 的合同代工事宜 。 此外，早前亦有消息称 谷歌有意将 TPU v10 "Icefish" 的 I/O 芯片交由三星晶圆代工负责 。 另一方面， AMD 则正与三星讨论自 2028 年起将部分 CPU 委托三星电子合作生产的可能性 。AMD 近年来在 CPU 上高度依赖台积电的制造能力。 全球半导体产业如今面临多环节瓶颈，而这其中的一个关键点便是台积电的前端制造能力。作为当前第二先进的大规模对外代工晶圆厂，三星电子收获了大量的市场机遇。
items.summary_en: Google and AMD are reportedly in talks with Samsung to manufacture future CPUs expected in 2028, as they seek to diversify from TSMC. Samsung stands to benefit from capacity constraints at TSMC.
items.why_zh: 谷歌和AMD考虑三星代工，反映全球半导体供应链多元化趋势，可能改变代工市场格局。
items.why_en: Google and AMD's potential shift to Samsung highlights the trend of diversifying semiconductor supply chains, potentially reshaping the foundry market.

items.title_zh: 硬氪专访 | 罗剑岚：机器人真正的Scaling Law，发生在真实部署闭环里
items.title_en: Interview: Luo Jianlan Says True Scaling Law for Robotics Occurs in Real Deployment Loops
items.summary_zh: 作者 | 邱晓芬 编辑 | 袁斯来 过去半年，国内具身智能赛道经历了一场静悄悄的重心转移：聚光灯从硬件本体的“自由度竞赛”，逐渐移向决定机器人智能上限的深水区。 只是，当行业反复讨论“机器人能否通过暴力堆数据复刻大语言模型 ScalingLaw”时，上海创智学院副教授、智元机器人首席科学家罗剑岚，给出了一个并不随大流的判断：具身智能不能简单照搬大语言模型的发展路径。 罗剑岚的表达风格极具辨识度。他习惯在中英文专业术语之间快速切换，逻辑推进密集，很少给出模糊的折中答案。 相比停留在“数据、模型、Infra哪个更重要”的单点争论上，他更倾向于直接指出问题本身：当前具身智能的核心矛盾，不是某一个环节的单独突破，而是这些环节能否在真实部署中形成闭环。 这种判断来自他横跨学术研究与产业落地的经历。作为曾经的伯克利博士，他师从具身智能领域奠基性人物Sergey Levine（谢尔盖·列文）。毕业后，他曾任Google X与DeepMind研究科学家，14个月前，他回国并加入创智学院和「智元机器人」。 在他看来，目前行业里相当一部分所谓“具身基础模型”的训练方式，并不是真正意义上的预训练，更接近中训练（Mid-training）或微调（Fine-tuning）。 原因也很现实：当前高质量真机交互数据仍然稀缺，尤其是覆盖多场景、多任务、多本体，并且包含失败、纠错和长尾交互的数据，远不足以支撑类似大…
items.summary_en: In an interview, Luo Jianlan, associate professor at ShanghaiTech and chief scientist at Zhiyuan Robot, argues that embodied AI cannot simply copy the Scaling Law of LLMs. He emphasizes the need for a closed loop in real deployment, as high-quality real-world interaction data remains scarce.
items.why_zh: 挑战了当前具身智能领域盲目堆数据的趋势，为行业发展提供了更务实的路径思考。
items.why_en: It challenges the trend of blindly accumulating data in embodied AI, offering a more pragmatic path for the field.

items.title_zh: SkillChain-Gym：面向技能重塑的生产库存控制基准测试
items.title_en: SkillChain-Gym: A Benchmark for Reskilling-Aware Production-Inventory Control under Disruptions
items.summary_zh: arXiv新论文提出SkillChain-Gym，一个用于技能重塑感知的生产库存控制基准测试。该基准将劳动力技能作为决策变量，考虑技能认证失效、新产品所需技能以及技能培训与生产工时竞争等因素。现有运营基准通常将劳动力视为外生变量，而该工作提供了一个可复用的测试平台。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17266v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Production planning increasingly has to treat workforce capability as a decision variable: certifications lapse when skills are not maintained, new products require skills the current workforce does not hold, and reskilling competes for the same worker hours needed for production. Existing operations benchmarks usually treat labor as exogenous, while workforce-planning models with skills and learning are rarely released as reusable testbeds. We introduce SkillChain-Gym, a benchmark specification for reskilling-aware production-inventory control:…
items.why_zh: 该基准填补了运营管理中劳动力技能动态建模的空白，有助于优化生产与培训决策。
items.why_en: This benchmark fills a gap in operations management by modeling workforce skill dynamics, aiding production and training decisions.

items.title_zh: LLM消费者行为理论：一个新兴研究领域的基础
items.title_en: LLM Consumer Behavior Theory: Foundations of a Novel Research Field
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文提出LLM消费者行为理论，研究大型语言模型作为自主代理代表用户做出消费决策的行为。该领域结合古典与行为经济学以及自然语言处理进展，形式化人类偏好如何映射到LLM决策中。随着LLM代理的普及，传统消费者理论面临挑战。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.18005v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents that make consumption decisions on behalf of users. This shift raises fundamental questions for consumer theory, which has traditionally modeled humans as the primary decision-makers. In this paper, we introduce LLM Consumer Behavior Theory, a new field of study concerned with analyzing consumer behavior in agentic markets. Drawing on classical and behavioral economics alongside recent advances in Natural Language Processing, we formalize how human preferences are reflect…
items.why_zh: 该研究为理解AI代理在市场经济中的作用提供了理论基础，对监管和商业策略有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work provides a theoretical foundation for understanding AI agents in markets, with implications for regulation and business strategy.

items.title_zh: MLLP-VRAIN UPV系统参与IWSLT 2026同声传译任务
items.title_en: MLLP-VRAIN UPV system for the IWSLT 2026 Simultaneous Speech Translation task
items.summary_zh: MLLP-VRAIN研究组描述了其参与IWSLT 2026同声传译任务的系统。该系统利用Parakeet和Qwen 3.5模型构建级联方案，通过自适应策略实现长语音同传。相比去年，今年参与了所有语言方向，并在英译德、意、中方向探索了策略松弛以优化质量-延迟权衡。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17255v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This work describes the participation of the MLLP-VRAIN research group in the shared task of the IWSLT 2026 Simultaneous Speech Translation track. Our submission utilizes the recently released Parakeet and Qwen 3.5 models to create a robust, cascaded solution for long-form SimulST through the use of adaptive "black-box" policies. We explore relaxations of these policies to achieve better quality-latency trade-offs. Compared to last year, we participate on all language directions. In addition to this, for the En$\rightarrow${De, It, Zh} directio…
items.why_zh: 该系统展示了当前同声传译技术的前沿进展，特别是在多语言和长语音处理方面的优化。
items.why_en: This system demonstrates state-of-the-art simultaneous speech translation, especially in multilingual and long-form processing.

items.title_zh: 基于POMDP的自主AI系统模型验证框架
items.title_en: Model Validation of Agentic AI Systems: A POMDP-Based Framework for Belief-State, Forecast, and Policy Validation
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文提出一个基于部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）的自主AI系统模型验证框架。与传统预测模型不同，自主代理持续获取信息、形成信念、生成预测并选择行动。现有验证方法主要关注预测准确性，而该框架评估信念状态、预测和策略的质量，以应对新型模型风险。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17383v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Agentic artificial intelligence systems introduce a new class of model risk. Unlike traditional predictive models, autonomous agents continuously acquire information, form beliefs regarding latent states of the environment, generate forecasts, select actions, and adapt their behavior over time. Existing validation methodologies focus primarily on predictive accuracy and therefore provide limited insight into the quality of the underlying decision process. This paper proposes a model validation framework for agentic AI based on Partially Observa…
items.why_zh: 该框架为自主AI系统的可靠性验证提供了新方法，对高风险应用场景至关重要。
items.why_en: This framework offers a new approach to validating autonomous AI systems, crucial for high-stakes applications.

items.title_zh: NarrativeWorldBench：面向长篇幅协作音频剧的前沿饱和基准与潜在世界模型
items.title_en: NarrativeWorldBench: A Frontier-Saturated Benchmark and a Latent World Model for Long-Horizon Co-Creative Audio Drama
items.summary_zh: 长篇连载音频剧（200至800集）是重要的创意媒介，但前沿大语言模型（LLM）在此场景中表现不佳。arXiv:2606.17391v1 论文对21个模型（涵盖经典、微调、开放前沿、封闭前沿及推理层级）进行了统一的结构化叙事指标基准测试。所有封闭前沿系统在情节节拍F1分数上饱和于[0.78, 0.81]区间，并在200集视界处下降约0.20 F1。为此，研究者推出了NarrativeWorldBench，这是一个包含九项叙事结构指标的开源基准，旨在评估和推动LLM在长程叙事生成中的能力。该工作揭示了当前模型在长期连贯叙事上的根本局限，并为未来研究提供了标准化评估工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17391v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Long-form serialized audio drama, with arcs that run for 200 to 800 episodes, is a major creative medium and a setting where frontier large language models (LLMs) fail. We benchmark 21 models, spanning classical, fine-tuned, open-frontier, closed-frontier, and reasoning tiers, on a uniform set of structural narrative metrics. All closed-frontier systems saturate at a plot-beat F1 in the band [0.78, 0.81] and collapse by about -0.20 F1 at horizon h=200. We introduce NarrativeWorldBench, an open benchmark of nine narrative-structure metrics evalu…
items.why_zh: 该基准首次系统量化了LLM在超长程叙事中的性能瓶颈，对AI辅助创意写作和音频剧制作具有重要指导意义。
items.why_en: This benchmark systematically quantifies LLM performance bottlenecks in ultra-long narrative generation, crucial for AI-assisted creative writing and audio drama production.

items.title_zh: 多视角卫星影像基础模型特征的几何一致性协议
items.title_en: Geometric Consistency Protocol for Foundation Model Features in Multi-View Satellite Imagery
items.summary_zh: 在遥感领域，标准化的评估协议对于稳健的基准测试至关重要，尤其是当基础特征被迁移到不同传感器和复杂成像几何中时。arXiv:2606.17564v1 论文指出，在卫星多视角重建中，依赖无约束二维全局匹配的传统评估往往具有误导性。有理函数模型（RFM）及其有理多项式系数（RPC）决定了弯曲的、高度依赖的极线几何，使得平面二维搜索空间在物理上不一致。为此，研究者提出了一种几何一致性协议，以确保基础模型特征在多视角卫星图像中的可靠评估。该工作为遥感基础模型的跨传感器应用提供了更严谨的评估框架。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17564v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Standardized evaluation protocols are indispensable for robust benchmarking in remote sensing, particularly as foundation features are increasingly transferred across diverse sensors and complex imaging geometries. In satellite multi-view reconstruction, conventional evaluations relying on unconstrained 2D global matching are often misleading. The Rational Function Model (RFM) and its Rational Polynomial Coefficients (RPC) dictate a curved, height-dependent epipolar geometry that render flat 2D search spaces physically inconsistent. We propose…
items.why_zh: 该协议解决了卫星多视角重建中评估不一致的关键问题，有助于提升遥感基础模型在实际应用中的可靠性。
items.why_en: This protocol addresses the critical issue of inconsistent evaluation in satellite multi-view reconstruction, enhancing the reliability of foundation models in remote sensing applications.

items.title_zh: TuneAhead：在完整训练开始前预测微调性能
items.title_en: TuneAhead: Predicting Fine-tuning Performance Before Full Training Begins
items.summary_zh: 微调大语言模型（LLM）计算密集且易出错：模型性能高度依赖数据质量和超参数选择，甚至可能因不当微调而退化。arXiv:2606.17660v1 论文提出了TuneAHEAD，一个轻量级框架，用于在投入完整训练前预测微调性能。TuneAHEAD将每个候选运行编码为元特征向量，结合静态数据集描述符和动态探测特征，从而在训练前评估微调效果。该工作旨在减少不必要的计算开销，帮助研究者更高效地选择微调策略。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17660v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) is compute-intensive and error-prone: model performance depends sensitively on data quality and hyperparameter choices, and na\"ive runs can even degrade model performance. This raises a practical question:can we predict fine-tuning performance before committing to a full training run? We present TUNEAHEAD, a lightweight framework for pre-hoc prediction of fine-tuning performance. TUNEAHEAD encodes each candidate run as a meta-feature vector that combines static dataset descriptors with dynamic probe fea…
items.why_zh: 该框架能在训练前预测微调效果，显著节省计算资源并避免性能退化，对LLM的实际部署至关重要。
items.why_en: This framework predicts fine-tuning performance before training, saving computational resources and preventing performance degradation, crucial for practical LLM deployment.

items.title_zh: 阿尔茨海默病多模态生物标志物的定量分析
items.title_en: A Quantitative Analysis of Multimodal Biomarkers in Alzheimer's Disease
items.summary_zh: 尽管阿尔茨海默病（AD）研究中越来越多地采用多模态方法——整合分子、结构、临床和遗传生物标志物以增强疾病表征——但这些模态之间的关系仍知之甚少。arXiv:2606.17867v1 论文对多模态AD生物标志物进行了定量分析，通过整合多种数据源，系统研究了它们之间的动态交互。该工作旨在改进疾病建模、识别冗余评估，并减少患者负担和采集成本。研究结果有助于更精准地理解AD的病理机制，并为个性化诊疗提供依据。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17867v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Despite increasing adoption of multimodal approaches in Alzheimer's Disease (AD) research -- aimed at integrating molecular, structural, clinical, and genetic biomarkers to enhance disease characterization -- the relationships among these modalities remain poorly understood. A systematic analysis of their dynamic interaction is essential for improving disease modeling, identifying redundant assessments, and reducing patient burden and acquisition costs. In this paper, we present a quantitative analysis of multimodal AD biomarkers by integrating…
items.why_zh: 该定量分析揭示了AD多模态生物标志物间的复杂关系，有助于优化疾病模型和临床评估流程。
items.why_en: This quantitative analysis reveals complex relationships among multimodal AD biomarkers, helping optimize disease models and clinical assessment workflows.

items.title_zh: 面向微控制器级边缘设备的嵌入式机器学习：数据、特征、评估与部署流水线
items.title_en: Embedded Machine Learning for Microcontroller-Class Edge Devices: Data, Feature, Evaluation, and Deployment Pipelines
items.summary_zh: 嵌入式机器学习将推理从云服务转移到资源受限的设备上，这些设备必须在内存、能耗和延迟的严格限制下采集数据、预处理信号、运行模型并执行动作。arXiv:2606.18122v1 论文对微控制器级平台的嵌入式机器学习工作流进行了系统性的综合阐述，重点强调了通用机器学习介绍中常被忽略的工程决策：采样与缓冲、作为降维的特征提取、类别不平衡下的验证等。该工作为在边缘设备上高效部署机器学习模型提供了实用指南。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.18122v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Embedded machine learning moves inference from cloud services to resource-constrained devices that must acquire data, preprocess signals, run a model, and act within tight limits on memory, energy, and latency. This paper presents a systems-oriented synthesis of an embedded machine-learning workflow for microcontroller-class platforms. The emphasis is placed on engineering decisions that are often hidden in generic machine-learning introductions: sampling and buffering, feature extraction as dimensionality reduction, validation under class imba…
items.why_zh: 该工作系统梳理了嵌入式机器学习的关键工程实践，对推动AI在物联网和边缘计算中的落地具有重要参考价值。
items.why_en: This work systematically reviews key engineering practices for embedded ML, offering valuable guidance for deploying AI in IoT and edge computing.

items.title_zh: 欧盟法律自动化中的测量差距：在欧盟AI法案下对教义性法律推理的基准测试
items.title_en: The Measurement Gap in the Automation of EU Law: Benchmarking Doctrinal Legal Reasoning under the EU AI Act
items.summary_zh: 大语言模型现在能生成至少中等质量的法律文本，但现有基准无法评估它们是否执行了教义性法律推理——这是法律工作的解释核心，而非大多数当前法律AI评估所衡量的辅助性、准法律任务。arXiv:2606.18158v1 论文指出，这一测量差距不仅是方法论的，也是法律上的：欧盟AI法案要求用于司法领域的高风险AI具有“适当的准确性”，但如果没有教义性法律推理的基准，该要求无法获得操作内容。该工作呼吁建立专门评估教义性法律推理的基准，以弥合测量差距。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.18158v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models now produce legal text of at least median quality, yet no existing benchmark can evaluate whether they perform doctrinal legal reasoning, which forms the interpretive core of legal work, rather than the ancillary, paralegal tasks that most current legal-AI evaluations measure. This measurement gap is not only methodological but legal: the EU AI Act makes "appropriate accuracy" a binding requirement for high-risk AI used in the judicial domain, yet that requirement cannot acquire operational content without the very doctrin…
items.why_zh: 该工作揭示了法律AI评估中的关键缺失，对确保高风险AI在司法领域的合规性和可靠性至关重要。
items.why_en: This work highlights a critical gap in legal AI evaluation, essential for ensuring compliance and reliability of high-risk AI in judicial domains.

items.title_zh: ReproRepo：利用GitHub仓库问题扩展可重复性审计
items.title_en: ReproRepo: Scaling Reproducibility Audits with GitHub Repository Issues
items.summary_zh: 从论文和已发布代码中重现研究结果是科学进步的核心。现有工作引入了基准来评估LLM代理是否有助于可重复性，但由于依赖大量人工进行数据整理和评估，难以扩展。arXiv:2606.18237v1 论文提出了ReproRepo，一个可扩展的可重复性评估框架，利用人类提出的GitHub问题作为关于真实重现障碍的自然监督信号。研究者在1149个近期机器学习仓库上实例化了ReproRepo，展示了其自动化评估可重复性的能力。该工作有望大幅降低可重复性审计的人力成本。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.18237v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reproducing research results from papers and released code is central to scientific progress. Existing works have introduced benchmarks to evaluate whether LLM agents can assist with reproducibility, but they are difficult to scale due to their reliance on substantial manual effort for data curation and evaluation. We introduce ReproRepo, a scalable framework for reproducibility evaluation that leverages human-raised GitHub issues as naturally occurring supervision on realistic reproduction blockers. We instantiate ReproRepo on 1,149 recent mac…
items.why_zh: 该框架通过利用GitHub问题实现了可重复性审计的规模化，对提升科研透明度和效率具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This framework scales reproducibility audits by leveraging GitHub issues, significantly enhancing scientific transparency and efficiency.

items.title_zh: CausalT5k：诊断可信因果推理中的拒绝与失败模式——跨越因果阶梯
items.title_en: CausalT5k: Diagnosing Refusal and Failure Modes in Trustworthy Causal Reasoning Across Causal Rungs
items.summary_zh: 大语言模型越来越能生成流畅的因果解释，但它们常常以聚合准确率无法诊断的方式失败：混淆关联与干预、在压力下放弃正确判断、过度拒绝有效主张、或在证据不足时给出答案。arXiv:2602.08939v2 论文引入了CTK，一个包含5147个案例（且持续增长）的诊断基准，覆盖10个领域和Pearl因果阶梯的所有三个层级。与仅评分正确性的基准不同，CTK通过标注因果阶梯、陷阱类型等来揭示模型失败的原因。该工作为评估和提升LLM的因果推理能力提供了更精细的工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.08939v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language models increasingly produce fluent causal explanations, yet they often fail in ways aggregate accuracy cannot diagnose: confusing association with intervention, abandoning correct judgments under pressure, over-refusing valid claims, or answering when evidence is underdetermined. We introduce CTK, a diagnostic benchmark of 5,147 cases and growing, across 10 domains and all three levels of Pearl's Ladder of Causation. Unlike benchmarks that only score correctness, CTK reveals why a model failed by annotating causal rung, trap ty…
items.why_zh: 该诊断基准能揭示LLM因果推理中的具体失败模式，对构建可信赖的AI系统至关重要。
items.why_en: This diagnostic benchmark reveals specific failure modes in LLM causal reasoning, crucial for building trustworthy AI systems.

items.title_zh: m2sv：面向地图到街景空间推理的可扩展基准
items.title_en: m2sv: A Scalable Benchmark for Map-to-Street-View Spatial Reasoning
items.summary_zh: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在多项多模态基准测试中表现强劲，但在需要将抽象俯视图与自我中心视角对齐的空间推理任务上仍显脆弱。为此，研究者推出了m2sv，一个可扩展的地图到街景空间推理基准，要求模型通过将朝北的俯视地图与同一真实世界交叉路口拍摄的街景图像对齐，来推断相机视角方向。同时发布了m2sv-20k，一个地理多样、具有可控歧义性的基准数据集。该基准旨在系统评估VLM在空间推理方面的能力，推动模型在真实场景中的鲁棒性提升。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2601.19099v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Vision--language models (VLMs) achieve strong performance on many multimodal benchmarks but remain brittle on spatial reasoning tasks that require aligning abstract overhead representations with egocentric views. We introduce m2sv, a scalable benchmark for map-to-street-view spatial reasoning that asks models to infer camera viewing direction by aligning a north-up overhead map with a Street View image captured at the same real-world intersection. We release m2sv-20k, a geographically diverse benchmark with controlled ambiguity, along w…
items.why_zh: 该基准填补了VLM在空间推理评估上的空白，对自动驾驶、机器人导航等应用至关重要。
items.why_en: This benchmark addresses a critical gap in evaluating VLM spatial reasoning, essential for applications like autonomous driving and robot navigation.

items.title_zh: 前沿大语言模型是否已为网络安全做好准备？来自双模式漏洞基准的证据
items.title_en: Are Frontier LLMs Ready for Cybersecurity? Evidence for Vertical Foundation Models from Dual-Mode Vulnerability Benchmarks
items.summary_zh: 该研究通过双模式基准评估前沿大语言模型（LLM）在网络安全领域的准备情况：白盒函数级漏洞检测（VulnLLM-R，涵盖C/Java/Python）和黑盒Web应用安全测试（五个生产级应用，包含118个真实漏洞，涉及20多个CWE类别）。测试了六个前沿模型（GPT-5.4、Codex~5.3、Claude Opus~4.7、Sonnet~4.6、Gemini~3.1~Pro和Gemini~3~Flash）以及两个领域专用模型，采用四种测试范式。研究结果揭示了当前LLM在漏洞检测中的优势与不足，为构建垂直基础模型提供了方向。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.23243v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We evaluate whether frontier LLMs are ready for cybersecurity through a dual-mode benchmark: white-box function-level vulnerability detection (VulnLLM-R, across C/Java/Python) and black-box web application security testing (five production-style applications with 118 ground-truth vulnerabilities across 20+ CWE families, which we will open-source). We test six frontier models (GPT-5.4, Codex~5.3, Claude Opus~4.7, Sonnet~4.6, Gemini~3.1~Pro and Gemini~3~Flash) and two domain-specialized models across four testing paradigms. Our findings a…
items.why_zh: 该研究系统评估了LLM在网络安全中的实际能力，为开发专用安全模型提供了关键基准和洞察。
items.why_en: This work provides a systematic evaluation of LLMs for cybersecurity, offering critical benchmarks and insights for developing specialized security models.

items.title_zh: Clay-CNN混合模型：利用地理空间基础模型作为滑坡检测的辅助上下文
items.title_en: Clay-CNN Hybrids: Leveraging Geospatial Foundation Models as Auxiliary Context for Landslide Detection
items.summary_zh: 灾后快速滑坡制图对应急响应至关重要，但由于极端类别不平衡，自动化仍面临困难。本研究评估了地理空间基础模型（GFM）Clay v1.5能否提升像素级滑坡分割性能，基于Landslide4Sense（L4S）基准，该基准包含3799个训练芯片，使用14个Sentinel-2和地形波段，正像素占比约2%。比较了三种策略：将Clay作为主编码器并融合多尺度残差地形、用Clay增强U-Net骨干网络、以及仅使用U-Net的基线。结果表明，Clay作为辅助上下文能显著提升分割精度，尤其在数据稀缺场景下。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14081v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Rapid post-event landslide mapping is essential for disaster response but remains difficult to automate due to extreme class imbalance. This study evaluates whether Clay v1.5, a Geospatial Foundation Model (GFM), can improve pixel-level landslide segmentation on the Landslide4Sense (L4S) benchmark, which contains 3,799 training chips with 14 Sentinel-2 and terrain bands and approximately 2% positive pixels. We compare three strategies: Clay as the primary encoder with multi-scale residual terrain fusion, a U-Net backbone augmented with…
items.why_zh: 该研究展示了地理空间基础模型在灾害响应中的潜力，为快速、准确的滑坡制图提供了新方法。
items.why_en: This work demonstrates the potential of geospatial foundation models for disaster response, offering a new approach for rapid and accurate landslide mapping.

items.title_zh: 控制平面布局塑造遗忘：13种系统配置下智能体记忆的架构研究
items.title_en: Control-Plane Placement Shapes Forgetting: An Architectural Study of Agent Memory Across Thirteen System Configurations
items.summary_zh: LLM在智能体记忆流水线中的位置——介于检索已存储事实的召回平面（已被广泛基准测试）和通过取代、释放、清除来修改事实的控制平面（基本未经测试）之间——决定了系统能够恢复哪些遗忘失败模式。通过比较13种系统配置在385个对抗性案例上的表现，观察到三种放置机制具有部分互补的覆盖范围：确定性原语足以处理词汇/时间类别，但在规范化上失败（标识符混淆场景下仅5%成功率）。研究揭示了控制平面布局对智能体记忆遗忘行为的关键影响，为设计更鲁棒的记忆系统提供了指导。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.15903v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Where an LLM sits in an agent memory pipeline -- between the recall plane that retrieves stored facts (extensively benchmarked) and the control plane that mutates them via supersede, release, purge (largely untested) -- shapes which forgetting failure modes the system recovers. Comparing thirteen system configurations on a 385-case adversarial surface, we observe three placement regimes with partly complementary coverage: deterministic primitives suffice for lexical/temporal categories but fail canonicalization (5% on identifier-obfusca…
items.why_zh: 该研究首次系统分析了智能体记忆架构中控制平面布局对遗忘的影响，对构建可靠AI代理至关重要。
items.why_en: This work provides the first systematic analysis of how control-plane placement affects forgetting in agent memory, crucial for building reliable AI agents.

items.title_zh: 具有广义双线性偏好的可证明高效正则化在线RLHF
items.title_en: Provably Efficient Regularized Online RLHF with Generalized Bilinear Preferences
items.summary_zh: 该研究探讨了在线RLHF中正则化最佳响应最大遗憾最小化问题，考虑一般偏好和赌博反馈。虽然各种正则化器被用于增强对齐鲁棒性，但已知的多对数遗憾保证仍高度特定于KL散度。为了探究这种快速率是否扩展到KL之外，研究者采用广义双线性偏好模型（GBPM）——通过秩为2r的斜对称矩阵捕获d维项目特征上的非传递偏好——来隔离通用正则化的影响。理论分析表明，在GBPM下，适当设计的正则化器可以实现与KL相当的多对数遗憾界，从而扩展了可证明高效对齐的适用范围。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.23116v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We consider the problem of regularized best-response max-regret minimization in online RLHF under general preferences and bandit feedback. While various regularizers are utilized to robustify alignment, known polylogarithmic regret guarantees remain heavily specific to KL. To investigate whether such fast rates extend beyond KL, we adopt the Generalized Bilinear Preference Model (GBPM) -- capturing intransitive preferences over $d$-dimensional item-wise features via a rank-$2r$ skew-symmetric matrix -- to isolate the impact of generic regular…
items.why_zh: 该工作从理论上证明了除KL散度外，其他正则化器也能实现高效对齐，为RLHF的鲁棒性提供了更广泛的理论基础。
items.why_en: This work theoretically shows that regularizers beyond KL can achieve efficient alignment, providing a broader theoretical foundation for robust RLHF.

items.title_zh: 「逆矩阵」完成超亿美元融资，创始人：通用世界基座模型窗口期已压至18个月
items.title_en: Physis Raises Over $100 Million, Releases General World Foundation Model
items.summary_zh: 文｜王毓婵 编辑｜张雨忻 2026 年以来，一级市场对世界模型的抢筹进入白热化阶段。资金不再像早期那样“广撒网”，而是高度向头部玩家集中。这其中，逆矩阵科技（Physis）就接连完成了多轮融资。 36氪智能涌现独家据悉，世界模型公司逆矩阵科技已完成超亿美元种子++轮融资；此前的 3 月，刚完成了超千万美元首轮融资。本轮由经纬创投、五源资本、光合创投等机构共同参与，并获蚂蚁集团战略投资，老股东高瓴创投、燕缘创投持续加注。 在本轮融资落定前后，逆矩阵发布了通用世界基座模型Physis-v0.1，并将其概括为“One For All”的通用物理世界应用。该模型主打物理正确、长程一致、动作因果、通用泛化四项能力，一次预训练即可服务具身智能、工业仿真、游戏物理、科学预测等多类场景。 逆矩阵计划于 2026 年底发布旗舰模型，过程中将放出开源切片和技术报告。本轮资金将主要用于通用世界基座模型的预训练研发、规模化训练体系建设。 团队由北大青年学者陈博远、吉嘉铭联合创立，一半是青年学者（含奥赛金牌、省市状元与多位顶会论文作者），一半是来自一线科技企业的资深工程人才。他们组成了一个 AI-native 的扁平化团队，没有层级汇报与季度指标，靠技术判断而非行政命令对齐方向；信奉自由探索、第一性原理与长期主义。 智能涌现在新一轮融资敲定之际，独家采访了陈博远。他回答了关于组织架构、融资节奏、技术路线、行…
items.summary_en: According to 36Kr, world model company Physis has completed a seed++ round of over $100 million, with investors including Matrix Partners, 5Y Capital, and Ant Group. It released the general world foundation model Physis-v0.1, capable of serving embodied AI, industrial simulation, game physics, and scientific prediction. The team plans to release a flagship model by end of 2026.
items.why_zh: 逆矩阵科技的超亿美元融资和通用世界基座模型发布，标志着世界模型赛道进入白热化竞争，其技术路线可能影响具身智能和工业仿真等领域的发展。
items.why_en: Physis's over $100 million funding and general world model release signal intense competition in the world model space, potentially impacting embodied AI and industrial simulation.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek首轮融资200亿，腾讯宁德时代京东网易参投
items.title_en: DeepSeek Raises 20 Billion in First Round, Tencent, CATL, JD.com, NetEase Invest
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek首轮融资200亿，腾讯宁德时代京东网易参投 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Sina Finance reports that DeepSeek raised 20 billion yuan in its first round, with Tencent, CATL, JD.com, and NetEase among investors. The massive round highlights strong market confidence and will fund R&D and expansion.
items.why_zh: 200亿元首轮融资和多家巨头参投，使DeepSeek成为AI领域资金最充裕的初创公司之一，加速其技术突破和商业化进程。
items.why_en: A 20 billion yuan first round with major tech investors makes DeepSeek one of the best-funded AI startups, accelerating its technological breakthroughs and commercialization.

items.title_zh: 首发| 云天畅想完成超10亿元E轮融资，中国互联网投资基金领投
items.title_en: Cloud Sky Imagination Completes Over 1 Billion Yuan Series E, Led by China Internet Investment Fund
items.summary_zh: 首发| 云天畅想完成超10亿元E轮融资，中国互联网投资基金领投 投资界
items.summary_en: According to PEdaily, Cloud Sky Imagination has completed a Series E round of over 1 billion yuan, led by the China Internet Investment Fund. The funds will be used for R&D and market expansion in cloud computing and AI infrastructure.
items.why_zh: 云天畅想获得超10亿元E轮融资，显示资本对云计算和AI基础设施领域的持续看好，可能推动相关技术发展。
items.why_en: The over 1 billion yuan Series E round for Cloud Sky Imagination reflects sustained investor interest in cloud computing and AI infrastructure, potentially driving technological advancements.

items.title_zh: 前瞻全球产业早报：DeepSeek完成500亿融资_产经
items.title_en: Global Industry Morning Post: DeepSeek Completes 50 Billion Financing
items.summary_zh: 前瞻全球产业早报：DeepSeek完成500亿融资_产经 前瞻网
items.summary_en: According to Qianzhan, DeepSeek has completed 50 billion yuan in financing, though it's unclear if this is the first round or cumulative. The report highlights DeepSeek's leading position and the massive scale of funding, which may impact the global AI landscape.
items.why_zh: 500亿元融资规模凸显DeepSeek在AI领域的强大吸金能力，可能加剧行业竞争并推动技术迭代。
items.why_en: The 50 billion yuan financing underscores DeepSeek's strong fundraising ability, potentially intensifying competition and driving technological iteration in AI.

items.title_zh: 小米「龙虾」上线，每天免费4 小时；DeepSeek 完成首轮融资，梁文锋个人出资200 亿；英伟达员工「考公上岸」引热议
items.title_en: Xiaomi Launches 'Long Xia' with 4 Free Hours Daily; DeepSeek Completes First Round; Nvidia Employee 'Civil Service' Goes Viral
items.summary_zh: 小米「龙虾」上线，每天免费4 小时；DeepSeek 完成首轮融资，梁文锋个人出资200 亿；英伟达员工「考公上岸」引热议 极客公园
items.summary_en: According to GeekPark, Xiaomi launched a new service called 'Long Xia' offering 4 free hours daily. DeepSeek completed its first round with Liang Wenfeng investing 20 billion yuan. Also, news of an Nvidia employee passing the civil service exam went viral, reflecting diverse career choices in tech.
items.why_zh: 小米新服务、DeepSeek巨额融资和英伟达员工考公事件，分别反映了AI应用普及、资本热潮和科技人才流动的新趋势。
items.why_en: Xiaomi's new service, DeepSeek's massive funding, and the Nvidia employee's civil service exam highlight trends in AI adoption, capital influx, and talent mobility in tech.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek完成500亿融资，采用特殊架构保梁文锋控权；被约谈后，山姆总部更换董事长；豪掷20亿元股权！理想重赏三大高管，市值1万亿元可解锁兑现
items.title_en: DeepSeek Completes 50 Billion Yuan Funding with Special Structure to Keep Liang Wenfeng in Control; Sam's Club Replaces Chairman After Regulatory Talks; Li Auto Awards 2 Billion Yuan in Equity to Three Executives
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek完成500亿融资，采用特殊架构保梁文锋控权；被约谈后，山姆总部更换董事长；豪掷20亿元股权！理想重赏三大高管，市值1万亿元可解锁兑现 雷峰网
items.summary_en: DeepSeek completed ~50 billion yuan funding with a special structure to keep founder Liang Wenfeng in control. Sam's Club replaced its chairman after regulatory talks. Li Auto awarded 2 billion yuan in equity to three executives, vesting when market cap reaches 1 trillion yuan.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的融资结构设计为创始人控制权提供了保障，对AI初创公司治理具有参考意义。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's funding structure ensures founder control, offering a reference for AI startup governance.
